title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch. Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React and Node.js.
whatYouWillLearn: Master HTML, CSS and JavaScript fundamentals
Build backend APIs with Node.js & Express
Work with databases and deploy to production

title: Machine Learning A-Z: AI & Python
description: Master machine learning algorithms, neural networks, and real-world AI projects with Python & scikit-learn.
whatYouWillLearn: Work with real-world datasets and pipelines

title: Ethical Hacking & Cybersecurity
description: Learn penetration testing, network security, vulnerability assessment, and ethical hacking from industry experts.
whatYouWillLearn: Perform penetration testing on real systems
Use tools like Kali Linux, Nmap, Metasploit

title: React & Next.js — Frontend Mastery
description: Build production-ready React applications with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS and modern state management.
whatYouWillLearn: Master React hooks and component architecture
Build SSR & SSG apps with Next.js

title: Flutter Mobile App Development
description: Create cross-platform iOS & Android apps with Flutter and Dart. Publish your first app to both stores.
whatYouWillLearn: Create beautiful UIs with Flutter widgets
Publish apps to Google Play & App Store

title: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
description: Dive into CNNs, RNNs, Transformers, and GANs. Build cutting-edge deep learning models with TensorFlow & PyTorch.
whatYouWillLearn: Build CNNs for image recognition tasks
Implement RNNs and LSTMs for sequences
Train GANs for generative AI projects

title: Node.js & Express — Backend Development
description: Build scalable REST APIs, authentication systems, and microservices with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
whatYouWillLearn: Build and structure scalable REST APIs
Work with MongoDB and Mongoose ODM

title: Cloud Security & AWS Defense
description: Secure AWS infrastructure, implement IAM policies, threat detection, and compliance for enterprise environments.
whatYouWillLearn: Configure IAM roles, policies and MFA
Set up threat detection with GuardDuty
Implement VPC security and firewall rules

title: Data Science with Python & Pandas
description: Analyze and visualize data using Python, Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib. Build real data science projects.
whatYouWillLearn: Clean and analyze data with Pandas & NumPy

title: iOS App Development with Swift
description: Build native iPhone apps using Swift and SwiftUI. Deploy to App Store with real portfolio projects.
whatYouWillLearn: Submit and publish apps to the App Store

title: Django REST API & Python Backend
description: Build powerful backend APIs with Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, JWT auth, and Docker deployment.
whatYouWillLearn: Build REST APIs with Django REST Framework
Write unit tests for backend services
Containerize and deploy apps with Docker

title: GPT & LLM Engineering
description: Build AI-powered apps with OpenAI, LangChain, RAG, fine-tuning, and prompt engineering techniques.
whatYouWillLearn: Use OpenAI API to build AI-powered apps

title: UI/UX Design & Figma Complete Course
description: Design beautiful, user-friendly interfaces. Learn Figma, design systems, prototyping, and UX research.
whatYouWillLearn: Build scalable design systems and components
Conduct UX research and user testing
Hand off designs to developers efficiently

title: Network Security & Penetration Testing
description: Master OSCP-style pen testing, network analysis, exploit development, and security reporting.

title: React Native — Cross-Platform Apps
description: Build and ship iOS & Android apps with React Native, Expo, and Redux. Includes authentication and payment integration.
whatYouWillLearn: Build cross-platform apps with React Native
Use Expo for rapid development and testing
Deploy apps to both iOS and Android stores
